oneLiner: Get ride estimates, request rides, and review ride history on Lyft.

tools.name: lyft_get_estimates
tools.summary: Get Lyft cost + ETA estimates for an origin to destination pair.

tools.name: lyft_request_ride
tools.summary: Request a Lyft ride. Money tool — two-step confirmation via simulate flag.

tools.name: lyft_get_ride_history
tools.summary: List the user's recent Lyft rides.
